---
title: ""
toc: false
about:
  template: solana
  image-shape: rectangle
  image: figs/profile.jpg
---

## Me <img src="figs/crow_s.png" class="bird-swap" data-hover="figs/crow_s_flip.png"/>

You can call me *'Raven'*. I am a Ph.D. student major in life sciences. I enjoy digital painting, [birdwatching](personal/nd_birding/index.qmd), and listening to music.

<details>

<summary>*3 Fun Facts About Me*</summary>

I like rainy days.

*Uchiha Itachi* from *Naruto* has crows as his messengers and incarnation - that's the major reason I chose *'Raven'* as my online nickname at 16 yo. From then on I keep encountering more loveable corvids in literature and reality...

[During primary and school my online nickname was *'Nyan-Nyan Elisa'*, which was somehow related to *Axis Powers Hetalia* for some reason I can't quite remember.]{.blur}

</details>

### Why Blogging

This blog started as a class project to build a professional profile. Over time, I decided to make it more personal. Blogging offers a peaceful online experience without big company manipulation - no ads, no infinite scrolling, no censorship. So, what you'll see here would be a mix of life science-related and more fun/personal posts. You can filter them by tags.

个人生活/兴趣内容主要用中文写作。

### Why 'Raven's Nest'

Corvids like shiny trinkets. I think blogging is like collecting and displaying trinkets online - maybe there are some inherent resemblance? When I lived in Baltimore, I used to see flocks of crows gathering on trees, especially during colder times at dusk and dawn. Sometimes what you think that are leaves would actually be a flock of birds. I tried to re-create that effect in the homepage XD
